properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v6 v6 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: So be it Lord Should You lead me to the desert Or to storms that I can't weather That bring me to my end

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So be it Lord I find You're all I've ever needed 'Cause You'll meet me on my knees And I'll up once again

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Let it be done to me according to Your Word There is a reason why You placed me on this earth Whatever it takes, whatever You ask Let Your will come to pass Let it be done to me according to Your Word

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: So be it Lord From the prisons to the palace To the one or to the masses I wanna see Your kingdom come

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: So be it Lord For Your fame and for Your glory I will run the race before me Until I hear Well Done

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I know You're good always My God, You're good always Your love is good always And You're not letting go

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Let it be done to me according to Your Word There is a reason why You placed me on this earth Whatever it takes, whatever You ask Let Your will come to pass Let it be done to me according to Your Word Let it be done to me according to Your Word
